---
format: "html"
---

## Adminstrative

### Welcome

[Welcome to the Applied AI Bootcamp!](./W1/lessons/01_bootcamp_intro.qmd).

### Communication

- Bookmark the [Shared Drive](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1X-mQ17zpkXD4VAeOfkSMKuPmCNlhMw1N?usp=sharing)
- [Join the Classroom](https://classroom.google.com/h) using the code  
    announcements, deadlines, submission, quizzes, grades, ..etc.

## Slides Tips

- `S` to open speaker notes
- `Ctrl+click` to zoom
- `Esc` to navigate the slides
- `M` to navigate from the outline
- `E` to view slides concatenated as one page

## Courses

1. [Python](W1/)
2. [Applied Data Science](W2/)
3. [Applied Machine Learning](W3/)
5. [Agentic AI](W4/)
4. [Applied Deep Learning](W5/)
6. Agentic Engineering
